backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Product and Order types with CRUD operations: add/search/filter products by category, place orders, retrieve orders, update order status, and initialize sample product data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the password-gate feature added to the admin panel, listing affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence level.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Jade luxury fashion app, setting metadata, Open Graph/Twitter card tags, favicon, and mounting the React app via /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining all application routes (landing, catalog, order tracking, order confirmation, profile, admin) wrapped in CartProvider and Layout.
frontend/src/components/CartSidebar.tsx: Slide-in cart sidebar component displaying cart items with quantity controls, order placement flow, and navigation to order confirmation or catalog pages.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A conversational chat widget that guides users through style, occasion, and color preferences to suggest outfit combinations from the product catalog. Manages a multi-step conversation flow and renders suggested product outfits with navigation to the catalog.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with logo, nav links (catalog categories, track order), cart icon, profile dropdown, and Internet Identity login/logout support. Handles mobile menu toggling and active route highlighting.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that composes the Header, main content area, footer with branding, CartSidebar, and ChatWidget into a full-page flex layout.
frontend/src/components/OrderStatusTimel: Displays a horizontal step-by-step timeline of order statuses (Processing, Confirmed, Shipped, Delivered) with animated progress line and icon states based on the current order status.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a single product card with image, category badge, name, price, and an add-to-cart button that shows a brief confirmation state. Maps IC-protocol image URLs to local asset paths by category.
frontend/src/components/ThreeDScene.tsx: A Three.js/React Three Fiber 3D scene featuring animated floating diamonds, rings, a particle field, and a mouse-reactive camera rig, used as a decorative hero background.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state management with add, remove, update quantity, and clear operations, plus open/close sidebar state and computed totals for items and price.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatHistory.ts: Manages chat message state for a style advisor chatbot, providing functions to add messages and reset the conversation to the initial welcome message.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including fetching products by category/search, placing orders, retrieving orders, and updating order status.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles for the Jade luxury fashion app, including a dark charcoal/gold color palette via CSS custom properties, Tailwind directives, and custom utility classes for gold gradients and card hover effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin page with a session-based password gate that, once authenticated, allows adding new products to the backend with fields for name, category, price, and image URL.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Product catalog page supporting category filtering, debounced search, and URL-driven category/highlight params, displaying products in a grid with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Hero landing page for the Jade brand featuring a lazy-loaded 3D scene, animated text reveal, background image overlay, and navigation buttons to the catalog and order tracking pages.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Order confirmation page that displays a success message and the placed order ID, with buttons to track the order or continue shopping; redirects to home if no order ID is present.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTrackingPage.tsx: Order tracking page where users enter a numeric order ID to fetch and display order details, item images, and a status timeline via the useGetOrder hook.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Profile page combining Internet Identity login/logout UI with an order lookup tool that lets authenticated users search for orders by ID and view their status timeline.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (gold, charcoal, cream), brand fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), extended shadows, border radii, and plugin integrations for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 13) documenting the Jade e-commerce site's summary, architectural notes, known issues, and the list of implemented and planned features.
